channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Legacy Companies Redefine Innovation in Various Industries
item.description: Companies like Arkadium, Astor & Sanders, Kaleidescape, and Unisys are pushing boundaries with cutting-edge tech
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: The 9 next big things in consumer technology for 2024
item.description: If you want to get excited about consumer tech again, look at these innovations. They include breakthroughs in material design and miniaturization to make your gadgets even sleeker; new technologies to improve your health and wellness; and some clever applications of AI and data analysis.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: These midsized companies bring fresh thinking to quietly important jobs
item.description: Equipment has always needed maintenance. We’ve been booking travel online for years. Even using speech recognition to create on-screen captions is not exactly a breakthrough new technology.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: The 11 next big things in AI and data innovations for 2024
item.description: The AI big bang that first caught the world’s attention with ChatGPT is sending energy and innovation out in many directions. Large language models aren’t just chatting and summarizing text: Now they’re also reasoning through problems with increasing autonomy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Map an AI strategy that’s yours, not SAP’s
item.description: As enthusiasm for AI and generative AI mounts, creating a winning AI strategy to help reduce operating costs and increase efficiency is easily topping the priority list for IT executives. There’s little question businesses are ready to reap the rewards of AI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump expected to attend SpaceX launch on Tuesday
item.description: President-elect Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk. The launch is scheduled for 5 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Azure Unveils Azure AI Foundry: A Unified Platform for Generative AI Applications
item.description: Microsoft launches Azure AI Foundry, a new service that combines Azure AI Studio and other updates to help enterprises develop, run, and manage generative AI applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft's Breakthrough in Reliable Quantum Computing
item.description: Microsoft and Atom Computing have announced a significant breakthrough in reliable quantum computing, creating 24 entangled logical qubits system.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Great Escape: South Carolina Monkey Compound Still Searching for Four Fugitive Monkeys
item.description: Monkeys escape from a research facility, and authorities continue to search for four remaining escaped females in South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Madrid Investment Forum, escenario de los proyectos de innovación y atracción de talento del Ejecutivo regional
item.description: La Comunidad de Madrid continúa apostando por la consolidación de la capital como nodo de desarrollo tecnológico e industrial y polo de atracción de talento especializado.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Top 8 failings in delivering value with generative AI and how to overcome them
item.description: Generative AI (GenAI) is rapidly emerging as a game changer for enterprises, but turning its potential into measurable value remains a significant challenge.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Los CEO cortos de mira abocan a los CIO a lidiar con una deuda tecnológica cada vez mayor
item.description: Muchas organizaciones están hipotecando su futuro reasignando recursos de TI de proyectos a largo plazo para lograr objetivos a corto plazo, según una encuesta reciente a directores ejecutivos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 11 Key Points for Achieving IT-Business Alignment
item.description: Unlock the secrets to achieving IT-business alignment through 11 key points, essential for organizational success.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to transform your architecture review board
item.description: I recall my angst about my first visit to an architecture review board (ARB), where a team of enterprise architects reviewed plans for new systems and application architectures.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A GRC framework for securing generative AI
item.description: From automating workflows to unlocking new insights, generative AI models like OpenAI’s GPT-4 are already delivering value in enterprises across every industry.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mobile AI opens new horizons for sustainable business growth in the digital age
item.description: As we navigate through 2024 and gear up for 2025, we are witnessing a pivotal moment in technological evolution where two transformative forces—5.5G (also referred to as 5G-Advanced or 5G-A) networks and artificial intelligence (AI)—are converging to reshape our digital landscape.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump appears to be planning to attend SpaceX ‘Starship’ launch scheduled for Tuesday in Texas
item.description: Trump’s visit comes as billionaire Musk has been a near-constant presence at Trump’s side as he builds out his administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Nvidia Blackwell chips face serious heating issues
item.description: Nvidia’s next-generation Blackwell data center processors have significant problems with overheating when installed in high-capacity server racks, forcing redesigns of the racks themselves, according to a report by The Information.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Company affiliated with Alex Jones seeks to disqualify The Onion's auction bid on Infowars
item.description: A company affiliated with conspiracy theorist Alex Jones asked a federal judge on Monday to disqualify a bid by the satirical news outlet The Onion to buy Jones' Infowars at a bankruptcy auction, alleging fraud and collusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Judge tosses Huckabee lawsuit against Meta over ads suggesting he endorsed marijuana gummies
item.description: WILMINGTON, Del. (AP) — A federal judge in Delaware on Monday dismissed a lawsuit filed by former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee against social media giant Meta over advertisements using his name and image to sell CBD products.
item.dc:creator: RANDALL CHASE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Lawrence Livermore supercomputer is crowned world’s speediest
item.description: "El Capitan" takes top spot in global supercomputer race, helping tackle daunting challenges in national security and science.
item.dc:creator: Lisa M. Krieger, The Mercury News

item.title: 1 in 5 get news from social media influencers: Pew poll
item.description: About 1 in 5 Americans say they get their news from social media influencers, according to a new poll from the Pew Research Center. Of the 21 percent of adults who said they get their news from influencers on social media, the split was roughly even across parties.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: About 20% of Americans regularly get their news from influencers on social media, report says
item.description: A report released Monday by Pew Research Center says about one in five Americans regularly get their news from so-called news influencers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Library of Congress says an adversary hacked some emails
item.description: The library said that an adversary accessed email communications during the period from January to September.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Onion CEO explains Infowars purchase amid Alex Jones's claims about auction
item.description: The Onion CEO Ben Collins confirmed that the publication purchased Alex Jones’s Infowars outlet in a Saturday series of posts on the social media platform Bluesky amid Jones's claims of wrongdoing and illegal activity.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: A challenge to recreate how the International Space Station was built
item.description: A new challenge looks to digitally recreate the planning of each module of the International Space Station. The post A challenge to recreate how the International Space Station was built first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Tech group presses Trump to review AI regulations
item.description: A tech lobbying group called on President-elect Trump and his team to ensure the U.S. maintains leadership in the development and deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) as it crafts the incoming regulations and policy on the advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple’s iPhone partners make plans for US manufacturing
item.description: In a sign of the times, Apple’s key manufacturing partners are ready to ramp up production in the US should the incoming Trump administration keep its promise to levy painful surcharges on Chinese imports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Why that Google Meet error might be a sneaky hacker trick
item.description: ClickFix, a new scam targeting computer users, is on the rise in the U.S. The scam prompts its targets to click on a link to fix a problem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In Cyprus, Ukrainians learn how to dispose of landmines that kill and maim hundreds
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — In a Cypriot National Guard camp, Ukrainians are being trained on how to identify, locate and dispose of landmines and other unexploded munitions that litter huge swaths of their country, killing and maiming hundreds of people, including children.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Elon Musk says he and Trump have 'mandate to delete' regulations. Ethics laws could limit Musk role
item.description: In picking billionaire Elon Musk to be “our cost cutter” for the U.S. government, President-elect Donald Trump won't be the first American president to empower a business tycoon to look for ways to dramatically cut federal regulations. President Ronald Reagan tapped J.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and TOM KRISHER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Observe, New Relic boost observability of Kubernetes workloads
item.description: Observability providers Observe and New Relic this week separately introduced Kubernetes-specific capabilities in their platforms that will enable faster problem resolution across complex container environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bitcoin neared $90,000 in a new record high. What to know about crypto's post-election rally
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As money continues to pour into crypto following Donald Trump's reelection last week, bitcoin has climbed to yet another record high. The world's largest cryptocurrency topped $89,000 for the first time, briefly peaking at $89,995 early Tuesday, according to CoinDesk.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation
